objective: Implement a full-screen ratatui TUI (Elm-style model-update-view) for collecting and persisting mcp-llm configuration, wired to a new `grove config` CLI subcommand that re-opens the TUI pre-populated from `.grove/explore.json`.
key_changes: Add `ratatui = "0.29"` and `crossterm = "0.28"` to `cli/Cargo.toml` only — core stays TUI-free.
New module `cli/src/config_tui/` with mod.rs (event loop), model.rs (App + Field + Action), update.rs (pure transitions, headlessly tested), view.rs (rendering).
Add `Cmd::Config` variant and match arm to `cli/src/main.rs`, dispatching to `config_tui::run(&path)`.
Non-TTY guard in `config_tui::run()` via `std::io::IsTerminal`; fails fast with descriptive error message.
TUI fields: Provider (Ollama/LlamaCpp), Endpoint URL text, Model text, Mode (Standard/Balanced/Aggressive + desc), Allowed Tools checkbox list.
Provider → URL auto-default: switching provider auto-fills base_url unless user manually edited it (dirty_url flag).
Save/cancel: `s`/F2 writes via `ExploreConfig::save(root)` atomically; Esc/q leaves config untouched.
Nine headless unit tests in `update.rs`: tab navigation, provider→URL coupling, mode cycling, tool toggle, save/cancel, round-trip, validation, pre-population.
CLI integration test: `grove config` with no TTY exits non-zero with `interactive terminal` in stderr.
Model auto-discovery (AC #5) stubbed as dead-code `Msg::ModelListFetched` variant — clean extension point without refactor.
Release binary size delta (baseline vs. post-change) measured and recorded in PR description per AC #6.
